HomePage.title: Üdvözöllek a <highlight>Modolt Minecraft Wikin</highlight>
HomePage.subtitle: A legjobb forrásod Minecraft-projektek felfedezéséhez, létrehozásához és az azokhoz való hozzájáruláshoz.

popular.title: Népszerű Wikik
popular.disclaimer: Ezek a projektek a megtekintési statisztikáik alapján ajánlottak és nem hivatalosan jóváhagyottak a Modolt Minecraft Wiki által.

users.title: Felhasználók
users.subtitle: Fedezd fel a kiemelt projecteket és élvezt az alábbi előnyöket:
users.docs: Férj hozzá kiváló minőségű, naprakész és verziózott dokumentációhoz
users.contribute: Járulj hozzá projektekhez programozási tudás nélkül
users.ui: Élvezz egy következtetes, felhasználóbarát kezelőfelületet az összes projekten kersztül

authors.title: Szerzők
authors.subtitle: Férj hozzá a Projekt Vezérlőpult, és élvezd az alábbi előnyöket:

localization.title: Lokalizáció
localization.desc: Fordítsd le a dokumentumaidad a világ nyelveire

free.title: Ingyenes
free.desc: A dokumentumok weboldalunkon történő tárolása teljesen ingyenes!

about.title: Rólunk
about.maintainers: Ezt a wikit a Sinytra építette és tartja karban, egy dedikált és szenvedélyes fejesztőcsapat, amely a Minecraft modoló közösség számára magas minőségű, Ingyenes és Nyílt Forráskódú szoftverek készítésére fókuszál.
about.mission: A mi célunk hogy modolókat és játékosokat egyaránt felhatalmazzunk azzal hogy ellátjuk őket azon eszközökkel melyek szükségesek az alkotáshoz, dokumentáláshoz és a modolt Minecraft végtelen lehetőségeinek felfedezéséhez.

Login.title: Bejelentkezés szükséges
Login.desc: Ennek az oldalnak az eléréséhez be kell jelentkezed.
Login.prompt: Kérlek hasznánd a GitHub-ot a bejelentkezéshez.

Preview.title: Előnézeti mód bekapcsolva
Preview.desc: Az előnézeti mód bekapcsol egy minimális felhasználói felületet, amivel jobban tudsz a dokumentumok írására fókuszálni a kiadás előtt.

Report.title: Egy dokumentáció oldal feljelentése
Report.desc: Jelents fel tartalmakat melyek megszegik a <tos>Szolgáltatási Feltételeink</tos>et vagy a <cr>Tartalmi Szabályaink</cr>at.
Report.contact: Auditálási célokból a felhasználóneved szerepelni fog a jelentésben.
Report.confidential: Your privacy is important to us, and this information will always be kept confidential.
Report.privacy: For more information, please refer to our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

locale.title: Locale
locale.desc: Applied if the content lies within a localized subpath.

version.title: Version
version.desc: Applied if the content lies within a named version.

reason.title: Reason*
reason.placeholder: Select a reason for reporting this content

details.title: Details*
details.placeholder: Please provide more details on why you're reporting this content. Note that empty reports will be ignored.

dislike.title: We understand that you may not like this content, and that's totally okay!
dislike.desc: Unfortunately, however, it is not a valid reason to report a project.
dislike.suggestion: Would you like to look for something else to explore instead?

ProjectRegisterForm.title: Register project
ProjectRegisterForm.desc: Register a new project to the wiki.

repo.title: Repository URL
repo.desc: This is the address you use to clone your repository.

branch.title: Branch
branch.desc: Primary branch ref. You can specify additional branches to include in your metadata file.

path.title: Path to documentation root
path.desc: Path to the folder containing the metadata file.

connect_modrinth.desc: Connect your Modrinth account in Settings to easily verify platform project ownership at any time.

success.title: Project registered successfully
success.desc: You can now navigate to the project's docs page

submission.note: This may take a while for larger repositories. Please stand by.

ProjectDeleteForm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
ProjectDeleteForm.desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your project and remove all associated data from our servers.

errors.internal: Internal Server Error, please try again later.
errors.unknown: An unknown error has occurred, please try again later.
errors.no_platforms: No platform projects defined in metadata.
errors.no_project: Platform project not found. Please make sure the metadata "platforms" field is correct.
errors.cf_unavailable: Registering CurseForge projects is not active
errors.requires_auth: Repository connection requires login credentials but none were provided
errors.no_path: Metadata file not found at specified path
errors.not_owner: User is not authorized to register this project
errors.repo_too_large: Repository exceeds maximum allowed size of 500MB
errors.insufficient_permissions: You don't have permission to perform this action

FormActions.get_help: Find out more about this error in our <link>documentation</link>.

CommunityBadge.title: Community
CommunityBadge.desc: Unofficial documentation maintained by the community

DocsPageNotFoundError.title: We lost this page
DocsPageNotFoundError.desc: The requested documentation page is not available at the moment.
DocsPageNotFoundError.suggestion: Please try again later or report this issue to the project author.

overview.availability: Available for <versions></versions>. Latest version built for <latest></latest>. First released for <first></first>.

license.title: Licenses
license.default: Wiki content <link>partially made available</link> under the <license></license> license.

DocsHomepagePlaceholder.title: Homepage placeholder
DocsHomepagePlaceholder.subtitle: Due to API restrictions, project metadata is not available for CurseForge projects in local environments.
DocsHomepagePlaceholder.replace: Don't worry! We'll replace this placeholder with the project's actual description once deployed on the live wiki website.

empty.primary: Looks like you haven't created any projects yet
empty.secondary: Get started by reading our <guide>author guide</guide>.

revision.title: Current git revision
revision.not_found: No revision found. Try reloading the project.

visibility.title: Project Visibility
visibility.public_desc: Public projects are visible in search.
visibility.unlisted_desc: Unlisted projects are published, but not visible in search.
visibility.private_desc: Private projects are only accessible by members of the project.

delete_modal.title: Delete account
delete_modal.desc: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This is a destructive action that cannot be undone.

AuthFailure.title: Authentication failure
AuthFailure.desc: An unexpected error has occured while trying to log in. Please try again later.

EmptyDataTable.guide: Read the <link>author guide</link> to find out more on how to integrate game data into your project.

empty.title: No additional versions were found in your project.
empty.desc: Read the <link>author guide</link> to learn more about project versioning.

empty.title: No items were found in your project.
empty.desc: Project items are automatically detected from content pages and included game files.

empty.title: No tags were found in your project.
No recipes were found in your project.

ResolvedProjectRecipe.workbenches: You can craft this recipe using:

DeleteDeploymentModal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
DeleteDeploymentModal.desc: This action cannot be undone. This deployment will be permanently deleted from our servers.

DeployProjectModal.title: New deployment
DeployProjectModal.primary: All project content will be re-fetched from the source. This option should be used upon updating the documentation source itself.
DeployProjectModal.secondary: If the new deployment fails, currently stored data will not be replaced. You can always roll back to previous deployments using the 'Redeploy' option.
DeployProjectModal.tertiary: For your own convenience, we recommend automatically revalidating docs after publication using our <link>Gradle plugin</link> instead.
DeployProjectModal.note: Project configuration remains unchanged. For updating meta information (e.g. source and platforms), please use the Settings dialog instead.

DeploymentIssues.title: Deployment issues
DeploymentIssues.issues_found: Found {count, plural, =1 {1 issue that needs} other {# issues that need}} attention.

ProjectError.requires_auth: Repository connection requires login credentials but none were provided
ProjectError.no_path: Metadata file not found at specified path
ProjectError.missing_required_attribute: Page is missing a required metadata attribute

RecipeUsage.description: Can be used to create the following items:
RecipeUsage.empty: Has no known usages in crafting.

AdminAccessKeys.title: System access keys
AdminAccessKeys.desc: Provides auth for when non-interactive access is needed, such as CI

days_valid.title: Days of validity
days_valid.desc: Number of days the key is valid for. Use 0 for no expiration.

SaveAccessKeyModal.title: Access Key
SaveAccessKeyModal.note: Keep the key value safe. You won't be able to access it again.

DeleteAccessKeyModal.title: Delete Access Key
DeleteAccessKeyModal.body: This will forever delete the access key <name></name>.

InteractiveComponentPlaceholder.title: Content unavailable in preview mode
InteractiveComponentPlaceholder.desc: Interactive components are currently not supported in the local previewer. The actual contents will be shown here when the project is deployed onto the Wiki website.

RevalidateCacheModal.title: Revalidate cache tag
RevalidateCacheModal.desc: Manually revalidate a cache tag. Used for diagnostic purposes.

popup.title: This website uses cookies
popup.description: This site uses cookies to improve your browsing experience and show embedded content.

summary.title: Cookie preferences
summary.description: Customize your privacy settings here. You can choose which types of cookies and tracking technologies you allow.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the proper functioning of the website and cannot be disabled.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: These cookies are used to enable certain parts of the website, such as video embeds, and may be used to track you.

more_info.title: More information
more_info.description: For further information on how we use cookies on our website, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

VideoEmbedPlaceholder.title: Video embed unavailable
VideoEmbedPlaceholder.description: Cookie consent is required to play embedded videos.

UpdateGameDataModal.title: Update game data
UpdateGameDataModal.desc: Fetch latest game data and run ingestion.

success.title: Game data updated successfully
success.desc: Updated game data to latest version

empty.title: No items were found in this tag.
empty.desc: Project tag entries are automatically detected from included game files.

AddProjectMemberForm.title: Add project member
AddProjectMemberForm.desc: Add a new user to this project

RemoveProjectMemberModal.title: Remove project member
RemoveProjectMemberModal.desc: Are you sure you want to remove this member? This action cannot be undone.

LeaveProjectModal.title: Leave project
LeaveProjectModal.desc: Are you sure you want to leave this project? This action cannot be undone.

NewProjectBanner.title: Ready when you are
NewProjectBanner.desc: This is a new project and does not yet show up in search. So feel free to play around and tweak things until they're just right. When you're satisfied with the result, hit the button below to go public.
